properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign and verify JWTs.

properties.name: app.jwt.access-token-ttl-minutes
properties.description: Access token time-to-live in minutes. Default: 480 (8 hours).

properties.name: app.mail.from
properties.description: From address for outbound system emails.

properties.name: app.mail.from.name
properties.description: Display name for the From address.

properties.name: app.mail.reply-to
properties.description: Reply-To address for outbound system emails.

properties.name: app.mail.smoke-test.to
properties.description: Address to receive smoke-test emails on startup (leave blank to skip).

properties.name: app.frontend.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the React frontend, used to build deep-link URLs in emails.

properties.name: app.supabase.url
properties.description: Supabase project URL (e.g. https://<ref>.supabase.co).

properties.name: app.supabase.service-role-key
properties.description: Supabase service-role key used for server-side storage operations.

properties.name: app.supabase.storage-bucket
properties.description: Supabase Storage bucket name for media assets.

properties.name: app.media-assets.deleted-retention-days
properties.description: Days to retain soft-deleted media assets before permanent purge. Default: 30.

properties.name: app.media-assets.purge-batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of assets to purge per retention job run. Default: 25.

properties.name: app.media-assets.purge-cron
properties.description: Cron expression for the retention purge job. Default: daily at 02:30 UTC.

properties.name: app.guardrails.enforced
properties.description: When true, guard rail checks block submission scheduling. Default: false.

properties.name: app.db-diagnostics.enabled
properties.description: When true, enables the DB diagnostics endpoint. Default: false.

properties.name: app.facebook.page-access-token
properties.description: Facebook Page Access Token for the DASIG Facebook Page.

properties.name: app.facebook.page-id
properties.description: Numeric Facebook Page ID for the DASIG Facebook Page.

properties.name: app.facebook.app-id
properties.description: Facebook App ID registered in the Meta Developer Portal.

properties.name: app.facebook.app-secret
properties.description: Facebook App Secret for token validation.

properties.name: app.facebook.api-version
properties.description: Facebook Graph API version to target.

properties.name: app.facebook.oauth-redirect-uri
properties.description: OAuth callback URI registered in the Meta app for token refresh flow (UC-3.5).

properties.name: anthropic.api.key
properties.description: Anthropic API key for Claude Vision caption and classification calls.

properties.name: anthropic.api.model
properties.description: Anthropic model ID to use for vision requests.

properties.name: voyage.api.key
properties.description: Voyage AI API key for embedding generation (voyage-4-lite, 1024 dimensions).

properties.name: spring.flyway.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable Flyway database migration on startup.

properties.name: spring.flyway.locations
properties.description: Locations of Flyway migration scripts.

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to automatically call baseline when migrating a non-empty schema.

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-version
properties.description: Version to tag an existing schema with when executing baseline.
